purpose: Prevent duplicate research, duplicate code changes, and duplicate knowledge distillation across sessions. Every new session MUST read this file before starting work.

absorbed_references.description: External resources already studied and integrated. Do NOT re-research these.

research_session_018.findings: Verlet particles, Fourier descriptors, cage deformation
Hidden layers with sin/gaussian/sawtooth produce richer textures
JSON metadata with rect/duration/loop for Unity/Godot
Bezier curves, spring physics, critically damped oscillators

completed_changes.description: Code changes already made. Do NOT redo these.

SESSION-018.change: Pipeline fix: reference/palette now passed to evaluator
CPPN: 70% enriched initial population in MAP-Elites

known_stagnation_patterns.description: Patterns that caused wasted effort in past sessions. Avoid repeating.

patterns.pattern: generator_invariant — parameter changes don't affect visual output
patterns.root_cause: SDF shape parameters have narrow effective ranges; most of parameter space maps to same visual
patterns.fix: Widen parameter ranges in ParameterSpace, ensure radius >= 0.25

patterns.pattern: evaluator_too_lenient — all images get high scores
patterns.root_cause: Only 5 metrics, no palette/reference passed, skip-to-1.0 for missing data
patterns.fix: 12 metrics, default penalty for missing palette/reference, stricter thresholds
create_enriched() with 2-4 hidden nodes and diverse activations

patterns.pattern: Knowledge base empty — rules and models not registered
patterns.root_cause: No one populated knowledge/rules.json and math_models.json

patterns.pattern: Repeated research on same topics across sessions
patterns.root_cause: No dedup registry, no record of absorbed references

session_efficiency_rules.description: Rules for future sessions to avoid wasted effort.
rules: RULE-1: Read DEDUP_REGISTRY.json BEFORE starting any research
RULE-2: Read SESSION_HANDOFF.md for current state and priorities
RULE-3: Check STAGNATION_LOG.md for known failure patterns
RULE-4: Do NOT re-research any topic listed in absorbed_references
RULE-5: Do NOT re-implement any change listed in completed_changes
RULE-6: When adding new research, append to absorbed_references
RULE-7: When making code changes, append to completed_changes
RULE-8: Run evaluator test on sample images to verify changes work
RULE-9: If evolution stagnates, check known_stagnation_patterns first
RULE-10: Always update SESSION_HANDOFF.md and PROJECT_BRAIN.json before ending
